title: RG42 5NE, Thames Water Utilities Limited: environmental permit issued EPR/FP3301MX/A001
body: "The Environment Agency publish permits that they issue under the Industrial Emissions Directive (IED).  This decision includes the permit and decision document for:    Operator name: Thames Water Utilities Limited   Installation name: Bracknell Sludge Treatment Centre   Permit number: EPR/FP3301MX/A001   "
